> Input: Improve the form layout — make it look better and feel more consistent with wha…
> Audit findings are ambiguous — pick the candidate to extend, or build new:
> 1. Extend `forms.labeled-input` (similarity 0.62) — `resources/views/components/forms/labeled-input.blade.php`
> 2. Extend `forms.stacked-input` (similarity 0.60) — `resources/views/components/forms/stacked-input.blade.php`
> 3. Extend `forms.compact-input` (similarity 0.58) — `resources/views/components/forms/compact-input.blade.php`
> 4. Build new — none of the above is close enough

**Recommendation: 1 — Extend `forms.labeled-input`** — similarity 0.62 is the strongest match in the inventory; reuse beats new code unless the contract diverges. Caveat: flip to 4 if the existing component cannot host the new behavior cleanly.

data.raw: Improve the form layout — make it look better and feel more consistent with what we already have.

ui_apply.summary: Form layout improvements applied to the extended primitive

rendered.resources/views/components/forms/labeled: Polished labeled-input variant — tightened spacing, consistent label weight, focus ring tokenized.

ui_design.layout: stacked form fields, max-w-md, label-on-top, consistent vertical rhythm

states.empty: Initial render: fields empty, submit enabled
states.loading: Submit pressed: button shows spinner, fields disabled
states.error: Validation error: field-level message under each input
states.disabled: Fields disabled while loading state is active

microcopy.title: Update your details
microcopy.success: Saved — your details are up to date.

a11y.labels: every field has a visible label tied via for/id
a11y.focus: first invalid field receives focus on submit error
a11y.aria_live: success card is announced via aria-live=polite
